_description: Canonical test vector for did derivation. Implementations MUST produce the expected_did from the given public key.
_derivation: SHA-256 of the EC P-256 public key in uncompressed point encoding (04 || X || Y, 65 bytes, big-endian), lowercase hex-encoded.
_note: Existing signed test fixtures in this repository use the legacy format 'dev-{identifier}' which predates this derivation specification.
